cn_title: Bungie曾考虑以《命运 Infinity》重启《命运》系列，最终决定关停《命运2》
opus_summary: 据报道，Bungie曾讨论《命运2》的未来，提出以「Destiny Infinity」品牌重启系列，但因成本和风险过高放弃。《命运3》也未推进，《命运2》将于6月9日停更。

paragraphs.en: Bungie's issues with its storied sci-fi shooter, Destiny 2, began around the time of the last summer's Edge of Fate expansion, which reportedly underperformed. The decision to pull the plug was allegedly made "earlier this year" after it decided not to relaunch the franchise as "Destiny Infinity."
paragraphs.cn: Bungie与旗下知名科幻射击游戏《命运2》的问题始于去年夏天的「命运之刃」资料片——据报道该资料片表现不佳。关停的决定据称是在「今年早些时候」做出的，因为他们最终决定不以「Destiny Infinity」的名义重新启动该系列。

paragraphs.en: That's according to Forbes, which said the Sony-owned studio began discussing different scenarios about "what the future of Destiny 2 would look like" after December's Renegades, its Star Wars-themed crossover expansion, "did even worse [than Edge of Fate] and didn't change sales or retention trajectory."
paragraphs.cn: 这一消息来自《福布斯》的报道。报道称，这家索尼旗下的工作室在12月的星球大战联动资料片「叛逆者」表现「比命运之刃还差，且未能改变销售或留存轨迹」之后，开始讨论「《命运2》的未来会是什么样」的各种方案。

paragraphs.en: Destiny Infinity would have been a relaunch alongside a return to the one big expansion model Destiny used to have, but the idea fell by the wayside after it was allegedly decided that the costs and risks were too high, especially in the context of support for Marathon.
paragraphs.cn: 「Destiny Infinity」本来会是一次品牌重启，同时回归《命运》系列曾经采用的大型资料片模式。但据称由于成本和风险过高——尤其是考虑到还要支持《马拉松》——这个方案最终被搁置。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 3 "was considered, as ever, but things didn't swing that way," and there has been no behind-the-scenes hints that a third Destiny game is coming, with the cost of the game's production cited as the key issue. Interestingly, it's thought Marathon's subjective success or failure was "not the tipping point of all of this."
paragraphs.cn: 《命运3》「一如既往地被考虑过，但事情没有朝那个方向发展」，幕后也没有任何迹象表明第三代正在开发中——制作成本被认为是关键问题。有意思的是，据信《马拉松》的成败「并非所有这一切的转折点」。

paragraphs.en: The revelations come a week after Bungie confirmed content updates for its live service shooter would end on June 9, nearly nine years after launch. The studio behind Halo, which recently released extraction shooter Marathon, said Destiny 2 will remain playable despite active development ending.
paragraphs.cn: 这些爆料距离Bungie确认其实时服务射击游戏将在6月9日停止内容更新仅过去一周——距游戏上线近九年。这家曾开发《光环》、最近又推出了撤离射击游戏《马拉松》的工作室表示，《命运2》在停止积极开发后仍可继续游玩。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 1 launched on September 9, 2014 for the PlayStation 3, PlayStation 4, Xbox 360, and Xbox One. It enjoyed enormous commercial success, but met with a mixed response from critics. As part of a high-profile publishing deal with Call of Duty company Activision, Destiny expansions and updates followed.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运》初代于2014年9月9日登陆PlayStation 3、PlayStation 4、Xbox 360和Xbox One。它取得了巨大的商业成功，但评论界反响不一。作为与《使命召唤》发行商动视的高调合作协议的一部分，后续资料片和更新陆续推出。

paragraphs.en: Destiny 2 launched on PlayStation 4 and Xbox One on September 6, 2017, with a PC version following a month later. Behind the scenes, however, tension between Bungie and Activision emerged, and the two companies officially parted ways in January 2019, ending their 10-year publishing deal five years early.
paragraphs.cn: 《命运2》于2017年9月6日登陆PlayStation 4和Xbox One，PC版于一个月后上线。然而在幕后，Bungie与动视之间的紧张关系浮出水面，两家公司于2019年1月正式分道扬镳，提前五年终结了十年发行合约。

paragraphs.en: With Destiny in its own hands, Bungie self-published the game, but it couldn't escape financial troubles and layoffs as Destiny 2 expansions failed to hit the mark and the player base dwindled. Sony bought Bungie in early 2022 in a deal valued at $3.6 billion, although Sony has admitted the acquisition has yet to pay off, and it recently reported a $765 million impairment loss due to underperformance of Bungie specifically.
paragraphs.cn: 拿回《命运》自主权后，Bungie自行发行了游戏，但随着《命运2》资料片接连未达预期、玩家流失加剧，他们依然无法摆脱财务困境和裁员。索尼于2022年初以36亿美元(约合人民币245亿元)收购了Bungie，但索尼承认这笔收购尚未回本，最近还报告了因Bungie表现不佳而产生的7.65亿美元(约合人民币52亿元)减值损失。

paragraphs.en: Extraction shooter Marathon launched early March, with a reported budget of more than $250 million. It too, according to analysts, has failed to meet sales expectations.
paragraphs.cn: 撤离射击游戏《马拉松》于3月初上线，据报道预算超过2.5亿美元(约合人民币17亿元)。但据分析师称，它同样未能达到销售预期。

paragraphs.en: Destiny fans distraught over Bungie's decision to end support for the franchise are planning to try and "crash the servers" to demonstrate that there's still huge interest in the game.
paragraphs.cn: 对Bungie停止支持决定感到崩溃的《命运》粉丝正计划尝试「挤爆服务器」，以证明这款游戏仍然拥有庞大的玩家基础。

subtitle: 再见了，老朋友
en_title: Bungie Reportedly Considered Relaunching Destiny as 'Destiny Infinity' Before Deciding to Pull the Plug on Destiny 2
